overview.insight_attend_good_desc: Excellent attendance rate, above the 90% benchmark
overview.insight_attend_mid_desc: Attendance is moderate and should be monitored
overview.insight_attend_low_desc: Unusually high absences: {count} people, urgent review needed
overview.insight_late_desc: {count} people late, {pct}% of those present — investigate the cause
overview.insight_trend_up_desc: Attendance this week is higher than earlier in the week
overview.insight_trend_down_desc: Attendance has declined over 7 days — analyze the cause
overview.insight_prob_warn_desc: Urgent probation decisions needed before the deadline
overview.insight_pending_desc: Many items awaiting approval, please take action
overview.prob_banner_subtitle: Approaching the end of the 119-day probation
overview.report_export_desc: View attendance reports, department/branch summaries, and export to Excel

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Calculate · Review · Edit · Approve
payroll.hidden_resigned_title: Click to view hidden resigned employees and restore them to this period
payroll.export_excel_title: Export with filters (company / department / brand / individual)
payroll.resigned_pool_title: Resigned employees (matching search) — not in this period
payroll.hidden_modal_sub: Left before period start ({date}) — restore to include in this payroll period
payroll.hidden_modal_empty: No hidden resigned employees this period
payroll.approve_warn_title: After approval, the period will be locked:
payroll.approve_warn_1: Employees cannot submit time/leave adjustments for this period
payroll.approve_warn_2: The system will not recalculate payroll again
payroll.approve_warn_3: HR can still edit on the payroll page as usual
payroll.confirm_unlock: Unlock this period? Employees will be able to submit time/leave requests again
payroll.hint_frozen: Employee info columns are frozen — scroll left/right to view income/deductions
payroll.hint_copy_col: Click a column header to copy it · hover a row then press
payroll.prorate_empty_hint: Empty = full month. Value <30 → prorates base salary only (KPI paid in full)
payroll.note_placeholder: e.g. Adjusted OT per summary sheet...
payroll.edited_by_hr: These figures were edited by HR
payroll.stale_data: Data may be outdated ({mins} min ago) — refresh
payroll.pending_eval_note: Awaiting manager's KPI evaluation this month
payroll.pa_desc: Only people on this list can view the payroll page + salary tabs (above super admin) — only members can add/remove

employees.title: Employees
employees.search_placeholder: Search name (Thai/English/Chinese), code, nickname, Feishu nickname...
employees.upload_subtitle: Download the template, then upload the filled file
employees.step1_desc: Excel file with column headers and a sample row
employees.step2_desc: Drag & drop or click to choose a .xlsx or .xls file
employees.tip1: • Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2026-01-15)
employees.tip2: • Department/position/branch names must match those in the system
employees.tip4: • Password can be left blank — the system will generate one automatically
employees.error_skip_notice: Rows with errors will be skipped — fix them and re-upload to import all
employees.importing_desc: Please do not close this window
employees.password_notice: The passwords shown above cannot be viewed again — please save or notify employees before closing this window
employees.download_failed_btn: Download failed rows to fix and re-upload

emp_detail.disc_desc: Record the employee's disciplinary actions/warnings — attach documents/images
emp_detail.card_resigned_note: Data remains in the system · Excluded from payroll
emp_detail.sched_assign_note: Add shifts anytime; the system automatically closes the previous shift when a new one is assigned
emp_detail.sched_no_shift_hint: No shift assigned yet. Please click "+ Add Shift"
emp_detail.sched_no_shifts: No shifts — add them in Settings → Shifts
emp_detail.sched_shift_name: Shift name (auto-generated from time if empty)
emp_detail.sched_overnight_label: Overnight shift (work_date counts as the previous day)
emp_detail.sched_late_allow_ok: ✓ May be up to {n} minutes late without deduction
emp_detail.emp_company_note: Changing company clears department/position/branch; reselect them for that company (type to add if missing)
emp_detail.emp_phase2_note: Leave empty = auto-calculated from Phase 1 end date · salary based on this date
emp_detail.emp_phase2_wage_line: Wage + social security + provident fund (PF) · normal tax
emp_detail.emp_term_title: Probation pass date & termination notice (1 pay cycle)
emp_detail.emp_term_note: Shows rule-based calculations — not an actual action
emp_detail.emp_eval_deadline: Probation evaluation must be completed by
emp_detail.emp_term_if_today: If termination is issued today ({date}) → effective
emp_detail.emp_attendance_exempt_note: No deduction for late / absence / early leave
emp_detail.emp_evaluator_note: Leave empty = use current manager as evaluator by default
emp_detail.emp_search_evaluator_ph: Search name or employee code... (empty = manager)
emp_detail.emp_kpi_evaluator_set: KPI evaluator set — will be used instead of the manager
emp_detail.emp_no_manager_warning: No manager yet — please assign a manager or evaluator
emp_detail.emp_position_history_empty: No history yet — it will appear here once a position change is saved
emp_detail.salary_wht_note: Set the % to deduct from gross income each month — leave empty for automatic progressive tax calculation
emp_detail.salary_fixed_deduct: Fixed deduction of {pct}% of gross income
emp_detail.salary_include_payroll_note: Off = kept in the system but not generated / not shown in payroll or Excel
emp_detail.salary_no_sso_note: Employee not enrolled in social security — no 5% deduction (max 875 THB/month)
emp_detail.salary_tax_3pct_note: Withhold 3% of gross income instead of progressive calculation (e.g. freelancers, consultants)
emp_detail.salary_pf_note: % of base salary · 0 = no deduction (Phase 1 Pre-Employee has no PF deduction)
emp_detail.salary_kpi_note: Standard KPI base amount (Grade B) — Grade A gets +20%, Grade C gets -20%, Grade D gets 0
emp_detail.checkin_no_branch: No branch assigned — go to the Check-in Rights tab
emp_detail.checkin_overnight_note: Overnight shift — clock-out on a different day
emp_detail.checkin_subtitle: Set the branches or GPS coordinates where the employee can check in
emp_detail.checkin_anywhere_on: Employee can check in/out anywhere without GPS verification
emp_detail.checkin_anywhere_off: Check-in allowed only at designated branches or coordinates
emp_detail.checkin_selfsched_on: Employee can schedule their own shifts — shift changes require approval
emp_detail.checkin_selfsched_off: Employee cannot self-schedule — only manager or admin can assign
emp_detail.checkin_paste_hint: Paste from Google Maps and the system will auto-split Lat/Lng
emp_detail.checkin_open_gmaps: Open in Google Maps to verify →
emp_detail.resign_note_resigned: Record the reason + attach resignation evidence here
emp_detail.resign_note_active: Employee is still active — you can record in advance, or click "Report Resignation" above to change status
emp_detail.resign_reason_ph: e.g. Voluntary resignation, job change, failed probation, contract end, termination...
emp_detail.resign_attach_label: Attach images / evidence (resignation letter, etc.) — max 10 files
emp_detail.resign_reason_ph2: e.g. Voluntary resignation, no-show, contract end...
emp_detail.resign_modal_li4: All data is retained — can be reinstated
emp_detail.reinstate_note_ph: e.g. Returning to work, new contract renewal...
emp_detail.promote_li_end_today: Record probation end date as today ({date})
emp_detail.promote_li_none: No pending new salary/position settings (status change only)
emp_detail.delete_reason_ph: e.g. Incorrect data entry, failed probation...
emp_detail.delete_modal_li1: Hide the employee from all lists in the system
emp_detail.delete_modal_li3: All data is retained — can be restored from the "Deletion History" page
emp_detail.role_employee_desc: Access to employee pages only (check-in, view schedule, leave)
emp_detail.role_manager_desc: Approve requests, manage shifts, view team data + employee rights
emp_detail.role_equip_desc: Manage equipment, stock, approve borrow/return requests
emp_detail.role_hr_desc: Manage employees, payroll, reports, and all company settings
emp_detail.role_super_desc: Highest privileges — manage all companies, view cross-company data
emp_detail.role_no_account_title: This employee has no login account yet
emp_detail.role_no_account_note: Create an account below so the employee can log in
emp_detail.role_pw_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
emp_detail.role_subtitle: Set the system access level for {name}
emp_detail.role_reset_pw_note: Enter a new password, or leave empty to auto-generate one
emp_detail.role_email_sent: Notification email sent to the employee
emp_detail.role_email_not_sent: Could not send email; please share the password with the employee manually
emp_detail.role_confirm_random_pw: Generate a random new password for {name} ?
emp_detail.role_will_set_entered: Will set to the entered password
emp_detail.role_will_random: The system will auto-generate a password
emp_detail.quota_no_leave_history: No leave history this year yet
emp_detail.personal_email_note: Changing the email also updates the employee's login email — the employee must use the new email to log in
emp_detail.confirm_create_account_l1: This employee has no login account yet
emp_detail.confirm_create_account_l2: A new account will be created with:
emp_detail.confirm_create_account_l3: Click OK to create — the system will copy the password for you to share with the employee
emp_detail.toast_email_sync_fail: Unable to sync email with the login system
emp_detail.toast_year_must_be_ce: {label}: Year must be CE (e.g. 2026), not BE ({y})
emp_detail.toast_max_10_files: Up to 10 files can be attached
emp_detail.toast_migration_needed: Migration not run yet (add resign_reason column)
emp_detail.addeval_subtitle: Additional supervisors, beyond the direct supervisor, who can evaluate/view this employee
emp_detail.addeval_empty: None yet — click "Add" to set additional supervisors
emp_detail.probassign_toast_fill_custom: Enter the round name and number of days for the custom round
emp_detail.probassign_description: Add unlimited evaluators — choose a round (45/90 or custom) and an evaluator (anyone) · each form is independent and HR sees them all
emp_detail.probassign_empty: None yet — tap "Add" to assign an evaluator
emp_detail.probassign_plan_toggle_desc: On = this employee is evaluated only for the rounds below (no 45/90) · Off = use 45/90 as usual, and the rounds below are additional
emp_detail.probassign_default_info: Using default: 45-day + 90-day rounds (evaluated by direct manager) · the list below is additional rounds/evaluators
emp_detail.probassign_plan_empty_warn: Custom plan is on but has no rounds — add at least 1 round, otherwise this employee has no evaluation
emp_detail.evalchain_no_manager_hint: Set a manager in the "Manager history" tab
emp_detail.evalchain_not_manager_hint: This person has no subordinates in the system yet
emp_detail.evalchain_legend_2_desc: = the manager's manager — can take over and evaluate on their behalf
emp_detail.evalchain_legend_3_desc: = assigned via the "Add" button in the "Employment" tab
emp_detail.evalchain_legend_4_desc: = reports of your subordinates — visible in /manager/kpi under "Downline team"
emp_detail.feishu_not_linked_desc: Link this employee to a Feishu account so the system recognizes them as the same person — used for data sync and cross-system notifications
emp_detail.feishu_search_placeholder: Search Chinese name / nickname / Feishu User ID / email...
emp_detail.borrow_subtitle: From Sample Request form + Feishu Assets table · {n} items total
emp_detail.borrow_overdue_banner: ⚠ {n} Sample Request items are overdue for return
emp_detail.borrow_overdue_banner_sub: Must be recovered before the employee resigns / changes position
emp_detail.borrow_try_other_names: Try searching Sample Request with another name:
emp_detail.borrow_connect_hint: Link the employee to a Feishu user first → click the "🔗 Feishu Link" tab
emp_detail.borrow_must_return_sub: Must be recovered before the employee resigns
emp_detail.brands_toast_saved_no_pct: Saved {n} brands (no percentages entered → cost will be split equally)
emp_detail.brands_normalize_title: Scale existing values proportionally to total 100%
emp_detail.brands_distribute_title: Split 100% equally across all selected brands
emp_detail.brands_sum_empty: Not filled — the system will split equally
emp_detail.doc_desc: Upload and store employee documents — multiple files at once
emp_detail.doc_pick_hint: Images, PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, text · up to 20 MB each · max 20 files

kpi.title: KPI Evaluation Results
kpi.subtitle: View and analyze evaluations for all employees
kpi.pick_month_desc: Select a month from the filters above (in the "Evaluated" tab) to see employees not yet evaluated for that period

kpi.all_evaluated_desc: All supervisors have completed and submitted evaluations to HR

kpi.btn_edit_title2: Edit scores/items — must re-approve after editing
kpi.evidence_files: Supporting evidence for the amount ({n} files)

Revert this form to "{label}"?

structure.subtitle: Org structure by department → manager → subordinate · Click for details
structure.company_change_note: Changing company clears department/position/branch — reselect for the new company
structure.pick_subordinates_btn: Select employees to add as subordinates...
